---
title: "test_norn_coordinator_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\unit\test_norn_coordinator_empire.py"
loc: 45
complexity: 1
logic_score: 5.13
style_score: 3.84
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.83
---

## Intent
The `test_norn_coordinator_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on coordinator, test_sync_tasks, test_get_next_bead, test_resolve_bead. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via coordinator, test_sync_tasks, test_get_next_bead, test_resolve_bead. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [sqlite3](file://sqlite3)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.norn_coordinator](file://src.core.norn_coordinator)

### Exports
- `coordinator`
- `test_sync_tasks`
- `test_get_next_bead`
- `test_resolve_bead`
